title: Locally Weighted Regression (LWR) Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of making a prediction for a query point using the Locally Weighted Regression algorithm.
relationships: Process starts with a query point
Weights are assigned to all training points based on proximity to the query point
A local model is fitted to the weighted data
The fitted model is used to predict the output for the query point
